name: VectorFieldCollectionType
summary: Represents collection metadata, including whether the collection is ordered, and whether the elements are unique.

enum_values.name: Unordered
enum_values.summary: Preserving element order is not important. (Default)

enum_values.name: UnorderedUnique
enum_values.summary: Preserving element order is not important and elements must be unique.

enum_values.name: OrderedUnique
enum_values.summary: Preserving element order is important and elements must be unique.
